case_title: OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO. VS. LAUREN PRINCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 399 FREMONT STREET #2402, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO. SERVED SEP-15-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-15-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCE, LAUREN
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$220.40 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY CO.
